data.title: Add PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag read at startup and inline branches at CPs 1-6 in preplanning SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context

Story 12bf-521f: Wire PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE through all 7 interactive checkpoints in preplanning.

This task implements the inline conditional branches in `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` for the 6 interactive checkpoints inside the preplanning skill (CP1-CP6). CP7 is handled separately in T3. Requires T1 (241e-0fdf) tests to exist first.

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md

## Implementation

### Startup flag read (Phase 1 Step 1, before any checkpoint)

Add after existing config reads at startup:

PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=$(bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/read-config.sh" preplanning.interactive 2>/dev/null || echo 'true')
PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=$(echo "$PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')

### CP1 - No epic ID provided (Phase 1 Step 1)
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false and no epic-id arg: log INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: no epic-id provided and exit with error.

### CP2 - Escalation policy (Phase 1 Step 1b)
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: use default 'Escalate when blocked' without AskUserQuestion.

### CP3 - Scope clarification (Phase 1 Step 3)
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: log INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: scope clarification required and exit with error.

### CP4 - Reconciliation approval (Phase 1 Step 4)
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: auto-apply reconciliation changes, but guard: do NOT auto-apply Delete recommendations for child stories currently in_progress status.

### CP5 - Story dashboard (Phase 4 Step 3)
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: suppress dashboard presentation.

### CP6 - Final approval (Phase 4 Step 5)
If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: skip AskUserQuestion approval gate and proceed automatically.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SKILL.md contains PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE startup read
- All 6 checkpoints (CP1-CP6) have inline branches for non-interactive mode
- CP4 guard: Delete recommendations for in_progress child stories are not auto-applied
- Tests in 241e-0fdf pass GREEN after implementation
